summary: Logical and operational tenant isolation: identity, data, network, and observability boundaries for GovAI-hosted and customer-managed control planes.

isolation_layers.description: Tenant identity is established server-side from credentials; client-supplied tenant labels are non-authoritative.
Ledger rows, exports, and billing artefacts are scoped by tenant identifier enforced in application logic.
Optional private connectivity and egress allowlists segment operator networks from tenant workloads.
Metrics and logs carry tenant dimensions only when policy allows; sampling must not leak cross-tenant payloads.
